description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a monochromatic color palette of white, gray, and black. The exterior walls are punctuated by large rectangular windows with vertical slats or blinds, providing both privacy and natural light. The house includes two rooftop terraces, each furnished with outdoor seating and protected by glass or metal railings. The ground level is surrounded by a paved walkway and a grid-patterned stone patio, set within a rectangular plot of grass. The main entrance is subtly integrated into the facade, with no prominent porch or overhang, emphasizing the sleek, geometric aesthetic. The overall structure suggests reinforced concrete and glass construction, typical of contemporary urban residences.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, rooftop terraces, and a minimalist white and gray exterior. The design features clean lines, grid-patterned patios, and glass railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, a central entrance, and a prominent rooftop terrace with seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the secondary terrace, symmetrical window arrangement, and the grid-patterned stone patio extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with additional large windows, vertical slats, and the continuation of the paved walkway.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the flat roof, both rooftop terraces, and the overall geometric layout of the house and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows and vertical slats
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a flush door, no porch or overhang, and integrated into the facade
